zh.lifeSummary: 當William Skipwith II於大約1325年出生在英國越可爾斯吉維茲時，他的父親William Skipwith36歲，母親Margaret Fitzsimon of Ormsby12歲。他於1351年之前與Alice Hiltoft在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1376年在英國被列為justice on the court of common pleas - restored 。他去世於1392年之後在英國越可爾奧斯比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Skipwith II于大约1325年出生在英国越可爾斯吉維茲时，他的父亲William Skipwith36岁，母亲Margaret Fitzsimon of Ormsby12岁。他于1351年之前与Alice Hiltoft在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1376年在英国被列为justice on the court of common pleas - restored 。他去世于1392年之后在英国越可爾奧斯比。

nameMeanings.name: Skipwith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: The main Skipwith family held the manor of Skipwith in England in the early Middle Ages, and direct descendants can be traced to the present day. In the 13th century they moved from Yorkshire to Lincolnshire, where their principal seat was at southern Ormsby. In the early 17th century there was further migration, to Leicestershire, Warwickshire, and across the Atlantic to VA. Other bearers of the name seem to have been tenants of Lincolnshire manors held by the Skipworth family, and to have taken the surname of their overlords.

variants.name: Skipworth
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): habitational name from Skipwith (East Yorkshire), from Old Northumbrian scīp (Old English scēap ‘sheep’), + Old English wīc ‘dwelling, specialized farm’, later replaced by Old Norse vithr ‘wood’; initial Sk-, instead of Sh-, is also due to Scandinavian influence.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Skipwith II was born about 1325, in Skipwith, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Skipwith, was 36 and his mother, Margaret Fitzsimon of Ormsby, was 12. He married Alice Hiltoft before 1351, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. In 1376, his occupation is listed as justice on the court of common pleas - restored  in England. He died after 1392, in Ormesby, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Skipwith II est né environ 1325, à Skipwith, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Skipwith, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fitzsimon of Ormsby, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Alice Hiltoft avant 1351, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. En 1376, sa profession de son indiquée est justice on the court of common pleas - restored  à Angleterre. Il est décédé après 1392, à Ormesby, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Skipwith II um 1325 in Skipwith, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Skipwith 36 und seine Mutter Margaret Fitzsimon of Ormsby 12. Er hat vor 1351 in Lincolnshire, England Alice Hiltoft geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1376 ist sein Beruf als justice on the court of common pleas - restored  in England aufgeführt. Er starb nach 1392 in Ormesby, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Skipwith II è nato il circa 1325 nel Skipwith, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Skipwith, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Fitzsimon of Ormsby, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Alice Hiltoft prima del 1351, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1376, la sua occupazione è indicata come justice on the court of common pleas - restored  nel England. Morì dopo il 1392, nel Ormesby, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Skipwith IIが約1325年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプウィスで生まれた時，父William Skipwithは36歳，母Margaret Fitzsimon of Ormsbyは12歳であった。1351年以前にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでAlice Hiltoftと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1376年，イギリスでの職業はjustice on the court of common pleas - restored と記録されている。彼は1392年以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアオルメスビーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Skipwith II(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 요르크실르 스키p위스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Skipwith(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Fitzsimon of Ormsby(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1351년 이전 영국 링코실르에서 Alice Hiltoft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1376년, 그의 직업은 영국에서 justice on the court of common pleas - restored 이었다. 그는 1392년 이후 영국 요르크실르 오메스비에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Skipwith II nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Skipwith, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Skipwith, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fitzsimon of Ormsby, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Hiltoft antes 1351, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1376, sua profissão aparece como justice on the court of common pleas - restored  em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu após 1392, em Ormesby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.South Ormesby, Lincolnshire, England: соут ормесби вит кецби анд калсеби анд дриби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Skipwith II родился около 1325 г. в местности скипвит, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Skipwith было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fitzsimon of Ormsby, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Hiltoft перед 1351 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1376 году он работал по профессии justice on the court of common pleas - restored  в местности Англия. Он умер после 1392 г. в местности ормесби, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Skipwith II nació aproximadamente 1325, en Skipwith, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Skipwith, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret Fitzsimon of Ormsby, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Alice Hiltoft antes de 1351, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1376, su ocupación registrada era justice on the court of common pleas - restored  en Inglaterra. Murió después de 1392, en Ormesby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
